DBConnection - package DBConnection
 
DBConnection - Class in DBConnection
Singleton class responsible for managing the database connection pool.

Private constructor to enforce Singleton pattern.

Deletes an opening hours record based on a specific special date.

Deletes an order (cancels it).

Deletes an order from the database.
